title: Update DESIGN.md §Rate Limiting with error code invariant
description: Why: -32020 is a stable client-facing contract. What: update DESIGN.md §Rate Limiting to document: (1) error code -32020 is RATE_LIMITED, stable wire contract; (2) limit is configurable via RATE_LIMIT_MSG_PER_MIN (default 120); (3) applies to BROADCAST, SEALED_BROADCAST, GROUP_SEND; exempt: WHISPER and read methods; (4) rolling 60s window, in-memory only (resets on relay restart).
acceptance_criteria: DESIGN.md §Rate Limiting documents -32020 as a stable contract
close_reason: DESIGN.md §Rate Limiting updated with error code, scope, and window semantics
